title: Storage Save
description: Persist a simple string value to the device's local storage using AsyncStorage.setItem().
problemStatement:
Save data! Write an asynchronous function `saveData(value)` that uses `AsyncStorage.setItem('@my_key', value)` to record a string to the phone.

**Requirement:** Correctly handle the promise with `await`.
hints: AsyncStorage is persistent; data stays on the device even if the app is closed.
expectedOutput: Data successfully sent to local device storage
